div1.entryFree:
Dependancy or Dependency, 1) concatenation, consistency: such a d. of thing on thing, as e'er I heard in madness, Meas. V, 62.
2) the state of being influenced and determined: though it be allowed in meaner parties to knit their souls, on whom there is no more d. but brats and beggary, Cymb. II, 3, 123.
3) reliance: let me report to him your sweet d. Ant. V, 2, 26.
